title: rubus tagallus var. lanyuensis
intro: Rubus tagallus var. lanyuensis, also known as Lanyu raspberry or Taiwanese black raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus genus, which is a group of thorny shrubs or vines commonly referred to as raspberries or bramble. This plant is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus tagallus var. lanyuensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cancer and other diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to be used for medicinal purposes.
